title: psychotria hirtula
intro: Psychotria hirtula, also known as the hairy psychotria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits of Psychotria hirtula are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, including those caused by bacteria, viruses, and parasites. Psychotria hirtula can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in some herbal remedies to treat a range of ailments.
